nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: working with the AI is a collaboration process, rather than just a solution

nodes.label: AI as time and stress management tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of additional burden
nodes.grounding_span: It helps me manage my time better, and provides some relief

nodes.label: AI as second set of eyes and perspective giver
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or misleading advisor
nodes.grounding_span: I also like to use AI as a second set of eyes

nodes.label: AI preservation of personal voice and essence
nodes.label_negative: AI altering personal tone and style
nodes.grounding_span: AI often tries to change the whole tone of something I've written

nodes.label: AI understanding of nuance and context
nodes.grounding_span: AI can definitely sometimes get things wrong and may not always understand some nuances

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and depth
nodes.grounding_span: stifle creativity and create work which is safe, surface level and not authentic

nodes.label: Efficiency and stress reduction
nodes.grounding_span: helps keep stress down, I know that I can get some quick help

nodes.label: Informed decision-making and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: helped me to formulate some questions to ask to clarify a few things

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I like reaching for AI tools to assist me in a variety of ways

nodes.label: Concern about AI stifling creativity and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: Going down that line has a potential to stifle creativity

nodes.label: Frustration with AI altering personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: AI often tries to change the whole tone of something I've written

nodes.label: Optimistic expectation of AI evolution as coach and partner
nodes.grounding_span: I really think that AI can become a second coach and partner

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — engages AI in dialogue to refine understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I approached the AI in a manner like 'Hey, what do you think she means here?'

nodes.label: Domain-specific boundary setting — maintains human authority over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely knew some things about the character already so I was in charge of some creative decisions
